name: Yo-Yo Ma
abstract: Yo-Yo Ma (born October 7, 1955) is an American cellist. Born to Chinese parents in Paris, he was regarded as a child prodigy, and began to study the cello with his father at age four.

about_quotes.speaker: Ron Carter
about_quotes.evidence: According to one of the events in the past two years, Yo-Yo Ma was playing outside, like in a White House event, with an aluminum cello equivalent to that.
